subcodes.first_line: O ye true servants of the Lord of Hosts! The services ye are rendering in support of the Ta'yíd School merit the highest praise.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان صادق رب الجنود خدماتیکه در اعانه مدرسه تایید نموده و مینمااید
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
